dashboard.label: Detection Engineering & SOC Metrics
dashboard.description: Executive overview of active detections, MITRE ATT&CK coverage, and live alert metrics based on lab telemetry.

search.query: index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4697 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=4104) | stats dc(EventCode)
index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=4104 OR EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=4720) | stats count
index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4697 OR EventCode=1) | stats count

index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4697 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=4104) | eval Tactic=case(EventCode==1102, "Defense Evasion", EventCode==4104, "Defense Evasion", EventCode==4698, "Persistence", EventCode==4720, "Persistence", EventCode==4732, "Privilege Escalation", EventCode==4697, "Lateral Movement", EventCode==4688, "Execution", EventCode==1, "Credential Access", 1=1, "Unknown") | stats count as Coverage by Tactic | sort - Coverage

index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4697 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=4104) | stats count as alert_count by host

index=wineventlog OR index=sysmon (EventCode=4698 OR EventCode=1102 OR EventCode=4720 OR EventCode=4732 OR EventCode=4697 OR EventCode=4688 OR EventCode=1 OR EventCode=4104) | eval Severity=case(EventCode IN (1102, 4732, 4697, 1), "Critical Alerts", EventCode IN (4688, 4104, 4698, 4720), "High Alerts") | timechart span=1h count(eval(Severity=="High Alerts")) as "High Alerts", count(eval(Severity=="Critical Alerts")) as "Critical Alerts"
